title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Willmott Dixon Developments Group Limited
body: "Application number 5314  Applicant Willmott Dixon Holdings Limited objected to the name used by Willmott Dixon Developments Group Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 7 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Willmott Dixon Developments Group Limited is changed to 15997829, Ltd. "
